summary.intent: Fix PR review comments on moltis/pull/471 by refactoring a boolean expression into a method and adding a missing test assertion.
summary.outcome: Added `GatewayState::is_secure()` method, updated all call sites in auth_routes.rs, added missing `; Secure` assertion in proxy-mode test, verified 16 tests pass with clean fmt, committed and pushed.

repo: Gateway security state is determined by `tls_active || behind_proxy`, now encapsulated in `GatewayState::is_secure()`
PR review bot (Greptile) is used for automated code review on the moltis repo
The project uses nightly rustfmt with if/else expressions expanded to multi-line format

code.finding: GatewayState impl block — new `is_secure()` method added after `with_options` constructor
Multiple call sites used `tls_active || behind_proxy` inline; all replaced with `state.is_secure()`. Test `session_response_proxy_mode_omits_localhost` was missing a `; Secure` cookie assertion.

workflow: PR review comments are fetched via Bash/gh API calls to drive the fix workflow
Review conversations are resolved after the corresponding fix is committed and pushed
fmt check and targeted test suite run are performed before committing

friction: Required multiple reads of state.rs to locate the right insertion point for the new method
Multiple separate Edit calls needed to replace all inline call sites in auth_routes.rs
